title: clidemia auricoma
intro: Clidemia auricoma, also known as the golden glorybower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Clidemia auricoma include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and wounds. Clidemia auricoma can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
